title: Medical College of Wisconsin Announces New President and CEO
summary_en: The Medical College of Wisconsin (MCW) today announced that Shekar N. Kurpad, MD, PhD, FEL ‘01, has been unanimously appointed as the institution’s seventh president and chief executive officer (CEO), effective July 1, 2026.
title_cn: 威斯康星医学院宣布新任院长兼首席执行官人选
